pkgmetadata.longdescription:
TensorFlow Lite (also known as LiteRT) is a lightweight inference framework for on-device machine learning. It provides APIs in C and C++ for loading and running .tflite models produced by the TensorFlow model converter. The runtime supports CPU inference on x86_64 and ARM64, with optional XNNPACK acceleration and an OpenCL-based GPU delegate.
This package builds only the TF Lite inference library and C API from the main TensorFlow source tree using the upstream CMake build system. It does not include the full TensorFlow framework, Python bindings, or training infrastructure.
NOTE: TF Lite is being succeeded by the LiteRT project at https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT. Future versions may migrate to that repository.

use.flag: Use the RUY matrix multiplication library instead of the default Eigen-based GEMM backend. RUY is optimized for ARM but also works on x86_64.
Enable the XNNPACK delegate for optimized floating-point and quantized inference on CPU. Enabled by default upstream.
